text: فَذَاقَتْ‌ وَبَالَ‌ أَمْرِهَا وَ کَانَ‌ عَاقِبَةُ أَمْرِهَا خُسْراً

en.ahmedali: So they tasted the pain of their actions; and the consequence of their deeds was ruin.
en.ahmedraza: They therefore tasted the evil outcome of their deeds, and the outcome of their deeds was a loss.
en.arberry: So it tasted the mischief of its action, and the end of its affair was loss.
en.daryabadi: Wherefore they tasted the evil consequence of their affair, and the end of their affair was loss.
en.hilali: So it tasted the evil result of its disbelief, and the consequence of its disbelief was loss (destruction in this life and an eternal punishment in the Hereafter).
en.itani: It tasted the result of its decisions, and the outcome of its decisions was perdition.
en.maududi: So they tasted the evil fruit of their deeds; and the fruit of their deeds was utter loss.
en.mubarakpuri: So it tasted the evil result of its affair, and the consequence of its affair was loss.
en.pickthall: So that it tasted the ill-effects of its conduct, and the consequence of its conduct was loss.
en.qarai: So it tasted the evil consequences of its conduct, and the outcome of its conduct was ruin.
en.qaribullah: So it tasted the mischief of its action, and the end of its matter was loss.
en.sahih: And it tasted the bad consequence of its affair, and the outcome of its affair was loss.
en.sarwar: They suffered the consequences of their deeds and their end was perdition.
en.shakir: So it tasted the evil result of its conduct, and the end of its affair was perdition.
en.transliteration: Fathaqat wabala amriha wakana AAaqibatu amriha khusran
en.wahiduddin: so they tasted the evil consequences of their conduct and the result of their conduct was ruin.
en.yusufali: Then did they taste the evil result of their conduct, and the End of their conduct was Perdition.
fa.ansarian: و آنان کیفر سنگین کفر و کبرشان را چشیدند و سرانجام کارشان خسارت بود.
fa.ayati: پس عقوبت عمل خود را چشيدند. عاقبت كارشان زيانكارى بود.
fa.bahrampour: پس سزاى كار خود را چشيدند و پايان كارشان خسران بود
fa.fooladvand: تا كيفر زشت عمل خود را چشيدند، و پايان كارشان زيان بود.
fa.ghomshei: تا کیفر کردار خود چشیدند و عاقبت کارشان زیانکاری (و حسرت) گردید.
fa.khorramdel: و عقوبت اعمالشان را چشیده‌اند، و عاقبت کار و بارشان زیان و خسران بوده است. [[«وَ بَالَ»: (نگا: مائده / 95، حشر / 15، تغابن / 5). «خُسْراً»: زیان. زیانکاری.]]
fa.khorramshahi: بدین‌سان عقوبت کار خود را چشید و عاقبت کارش زیان بود
fa.makarem: آنها آثار سوء کار خود را چشیدند؛ و عاقبت کارشان خسران بود!
fa.moezzi: پس چشید فرجام کار خویش را و شد پایان کار او زیانکاری‌
fa.mojtabavi: پس سرانجامِ بدِ كارِ خود را چشيدند و عاقبت كارشان زيانكارى بود.
fa.sadeqi: پس کیفر زشت عمل خود را چشیدند و پایان کارشان زیان بود.
